Artwork to be supplied in print ready High Resolution EPS or PDF format. If specific colours are required, these are to be provided as PMS or Pantone: or additional matching fees will be incurred.

3D ILLUMINATED RECEPTION SIGNS
Electrical Cables will need to be installed in the wall. We recommend that this be done at the building stage. We nornally attend site to install the electrical cables before the wall is sheeted. If this is not possible - we may need to cut the sheeting on the behind wall.

Rectification is NOT included in the quote.

Quote is based on all items selected at one time. 

Price is based on works being completed during normal working hours.

Engineering not included - if applicable. 
Council approvals and permits not included - if applicable.
Landlord approvals not included - if applicable

OUT DOOR ILLUMINATED SIGNS

[IMPORTANT NOTE]
Please do not operate outdoor illuminated signage for 24 hours or during the day.

A timer must be installed by a licenced electrician to ensure lights are not on during the day. Unless a timer is installed to restrict running times to night hours - no warranty applies.

Lighting run during during day time could cause electrical failure from intense heat and void any warranty. 

Unless a timer is installed to restrict running times to night hours - no warranty applies.

*3D and other illuminated reception signs: Electrical cables will have to be fed through cavity walls for the electrical connection. Where this is not possible the reverse side wall may need to be accessed. Rectification and repainting is not included in this quote.

*Lightboxes: Where only lightbox face is replaced, no responsibility is taken for the condition of lightbox internals i.e. internal lighting. Customer should ensure these are in good condition. 

Our products may contain ACM. This material is not rated as non-combustible. It is the customer's responsibility to specify that signage be constructed entirely from non-combustible materials. Quote will need to be revised should this be a requirement. Signarama Springwood bears no responsibility whatsoever if non-combustable materials have not been specifically quoted for.

LIGHTBOX REFURB

Any refurbishment of lightboxes assumes the lightbox structure is sound. Should this not be the case additional costs for rectification will be quoted to the customer before the job can proceed.

In some cases - a new lightbox may be required if the current one is not repairable. The client will be notified of this and supplied with a quote. 

NEON FLEX

Neon flex signs are for internal use only and cannot be exposed to the elements. Limited success can be had if they are installed under cover if outdoors.

Outdoor Neon Flex products are available but expected life is reduced due to exposure to the elements. We do not warranty externally installed Neon flex.

Sailtrack Banners are not fire rated or non-combustible

COUNCIL APPROVALS AND FEES

It is the customer's responsibility to apply for signage approvals from their Local Council - if this is required. In accepting our quote - the customer takes FULL responsibility for Council approvals. Signarama Springwood bears no responsibility.

Annual signage permits and fees may also apply. These are the sole responsibility of the customer. Signarama Springwood bears no responsibility for these and costs are not included in the quote.

LANDLORD APPROVALS

It is the customer's sole responsibility to obtain approvals for any works from the Landlord, where applicable. We will supply relevant documentation as required (additional fees apply for SWMS and inductions) - additional fees will apply.

SWMS and inductions

Please advise if these are required - additional costs apply and will be quoted based on what is required.
